query:
-- Aus Ships has xeroContactName = '' (empty) - this is why no Xero items match
-- Check what Xero contact names exist that could be Aus Ships
-- Also check if there's a 'Aus Ships' or similar in Xero by looking at all unmatched Xero items
SELECT DISTINCT contactName, COUNT(*) as items, SUM(lineAmount) as revenue
FROM billing_items
WHERE (billingPlatform = '' OR billingPlatform IS NULL)
  AND matchStatus = 'unmatched'
GROUP BY contactName
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Aus Ships has xeroContactName = '' (empty) - this is why no Xero items match
-- Check what Xero contact names exist that could be Aus Ships
-- Also check if there's a 'Aus Ships' or similar in Xero by looking at all unmatched Xero items
SELECT DISTINCT contactName, COUNT(*) as items, SUM(lineAmount) as revenue
FROM billing_items
WHERE (billingPlatform = '' OR billingPlatform IS NULL)
  AND matchStatus = 'unmatched'
GROUP BY contactName
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 20;
